content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The client did move from a fairly analytical opening ('I'm ready to look at this. I think') toward more embodied awareness by turn 13 ('Chest... upper chest. Not painful, just — present... I've stopped registering it'). There's a genuine softening in pace and a new piece of self-knowledge surfacing — the client notices a chronic background activation they'd stopped registering. That's real, but partial. The breakthrough condition for this profile is specifically about the coach respecting a 'no' and pivoting to grounding — but the client never issued the no in this excerpt, because the coach paced well and stayed in the upper-body somatic territory. So we can't evaluate the actual breakthrough condition; what we can see is incremental deepening (intellectual → low-hum awareness → locating it in chest) without yet reaching a felt shift in the freeze pattern itself. The client foreshadows the deeper layer ('Ask me again when we get closer... to my dad. I have a feeling it'll be different then') but the conversation ends before that territory is entered or moved through. A layer was approached and lightly entered, not traversed.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening stance: intellectual readiness with hedged 'I think' — surface presentation."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client immediately self-corrects with honesty: 'tired of not being ready' — small shift toward truth."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names a harder-to-articulate cost: 'a version of myself I can't access' — deeper than the initial framing."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client accesses an image of the clear self and where she goes — productive but still descriptive."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client explicitly flags the limit: 'I can talk about this pretty analytically... knowing the origin doesn't seem to change the reflex.' Self-aware but not yet shifted."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client checks in somatically, names a 'low hum,' and predicts the real territory is near the father material — beginning of embodied tracking."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client locates the hum in upper chest and notices it's chronic background — a new piece of awareness, but still observational rather than a felt movement."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["How is your body right now?"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["Can you feel your feet?", "What would help you slow down?", "calibrate-the-threshold", "become-the-authority-figure", "the-rush-signature", "kinked-emotions"],
  "notes": "Conversation appears to end mid-arc at turn 14. Within the visible turns, the coach paced well and the client deepened incrementally, but the freeze pattern itself wasn't met or shifted — only described and located. Score 2 reflects partial movement without the core territory being entered."
}
